heading: Repealed. , title XIII, § 1313,July 1, 1944, ch. 37358 Stat. 714
label: 17 to 25e Repealed. , title XIII, § 1313,July 1, 1944, ch. 37358 Stat. 714
notes: Section 17, , , provided for a detail for duty with Department of Agriculture. See .act Oct. 1, 1918, ch. 17840 Stat. 992section 215 of this title

Section 17a, , , provided for a detail for duty with executive and independent departments carrying on public health activities. See .act Apr. 9, 1930, ch. 125, § 146 Stat. 150section 215 of this title
Section 17b, , , provided for a detail for duty with educational and research institutions. See .act Apr. 9, 1930, ch. 125, § 2(a)46 Stat. 150section 215 of this title
Section 17c, , , provided for a detail for duty on vessels of Coast and Geodetic Survey. See .act Apr. 26, 1939, ch. 92, § 153 Stat. 620section 215 of this title
Section 18, , , provided for a Reserve of the Public Health Service. See sections 204, 207, 209, and 210 of this title.act Oct. 27, 1918, ch. 19640 Stat. 1017

Section 18a, , , provided for assignment of Reserve officers to active duty and for such service counting for promotion credits. See .act Apr. 9, 1930, ch. 125, § 646 Stat. 151section 204 of this title
Section 18b, , , provided for distribution of Reserve officers among the several grades. See .act Mar. 18, 1943, ch. 17, title I57 Stat. 24section 209 of this title
Section 19, acts , ; , , provided for leaves of absence for medical officers. See .Feb. 19, 1897, ch. 26529 Stat. 554Aug. 14, 1912, ch. 288, § 137 Stat. 309section 210–1 of this title
Section 20, , , provided for pensions to officers detailed for service with Coast Guard, Army, or Navy. See .act July 9, 1917, ch. 3740 Stat. 242section 213 of this title

Section 21, acts , ; , ; , ; , , provided for establishment of National Advisory Health Council as an advisory board for National Institute of Health. See .July 1, 1902, ch. 1370, § 532 Stat. 713Aug. 14, 1912, ch. 288, § 137 Stat. 309Apr. 9, 1930, ch. 125, § 1346 Stat. 152May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 146 Stat. 379section 218 of this title
Section 21a, , , provided for compensation of National Advisory Health Council. See .act Aug. 10, 1939, ch. 63653 Stat. 1338section 210 of this title

Section 22, acts , ; , ; , , provided for appointment of chiefs of divisions and director of institute, and their pay and allowances. See sections 206 and 210 of this title.July 1, 1902, ch. 1370, § 632 Stat. 713Aug. 14, 1912, ch. 288, § 137 Stat. 309May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 146 Stat. 379
Section 23, , , provided for pay of director of Hygienic Laboratory which is now known as the National Institute of Health. See .act Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 14937 Stat. 915section 210 of this title

Section 23a, , , provided that Hygienic Laboratory should be succeeded by the National Institute of Health and that all laws, authorizations, and appropriations of Hygienic Laboratory should become applicable to its successor.act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 146 Stat. 379
Section 23b, , , provided for acceptance of gifts by Federal Security Administrator. See .act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 246 Stat. 379section 219 of this title
Section 23c, , , provided for detailing to duty of scientists receiving fellowships. See sections 209 and 241 of this title.act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 346 Stat. 380
Section 23d, , , provided for appointment and compensation of personnel of the National Institute of Health. See .act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 446 Stat. 380section 209 of this title

Section 23e, , , provided that facilities of the National Institute of Health be available to States, counties, and municipalities. See .act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 546 Stat. 380section 241 of this title
Section 23f, , , provided for rank, pay, and allowances of Director of the Institute. See sections 206, 207, and 210 of this title.act May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 646 Stat. 380

Section 23g, acts , ; , , provided for additional divisions in Institute as authorized by Administrator. See .Apr. 9, 1930, ch. 125, § 2(b)46 Stat. 150May 26, 1930, ch. 320, § 146 Stat. 379section 203 of this title
Section 24, , ch. XV, § 3, , provided for establishment of a Division of Venereal Diseases.act July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 886
Section 25, , ch. XV, § 4, , provided for duties of Division of Venereal Diseases.act July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 886

Section 25a, , ch. XV, § 4a, as added , , provided for appropriations to assist political subdivisions in venereal disease work. See sections 241 and 246 of this title.act July 9, 1918, ch. 143May 24, 1938, ch. 26752 Stat. 439

Section 25b, , ch. XV, § 4b, as added , , provided for allotments to political subdivisions for venereal disease work. See .act July 9, 1918, ch. 143May 24, 1938, ch. 26752 Stat. 439section 246 of this title
Section 25c, , ch. XV, § 4c, as added , , provided for payments from allotments to political subdivisions. See .act July 9, 1918, ch. 143May 24, 1938, ch. 26752 Stat. 439section 246 of this title

Section 25d, , ch. XV, § 4d, as added , , provided for rules and regulations governing the Division of Venereal Diseases, is covered by .act July 9, 1918, ch. 143May 24, 1938, ch. 26752 Stat. 439section 216 of this title
Section 25e, , ch. XV, § 4e, as added , , provided for construction of sections 25a to 25e of this title.act July 9, 1918, ch. 143May 24, 1938, ch. 26752 Stat. 439
